intended_use: The Butterfly Auto 3D Bladder Volume Tool is a software application package. It is designed to view, quantify and report results acquired on Butterfly Network ultrasound systems for noninvasive volume
intended_use_full: The Butterfly Auto 3D Bladder Volume Tool is a software application package. It is designed to view, quantify and report results acquired on Butterfly Network ultrasound systems for noninvasive volume measurements of the bladder, to support physician diagnosis. Indicated for use in adult populations.
other_metrics: Measurement Accuracy: 0-100mL = ±7.5mL; 100-740 mL = ±7.5%; Measurement Range: 0 to 740 mL; Inter and intra-operator variability was assessed
